data.title: US used to encourage India to buy Russian oil, Indian foreign minister reveals
data.description:

The statement comes as a White House advisor indicated the Trump administration intends to proceed with a planned hike of tariffs on Indian goods over New Delhi’s oil […]

data.title: Shiba Inu Bullish Divergence Signals Possible 155% Price Explosion
data.description:
In Brief 🎧 Listen to This Article Hit play below to hear the narrated version. Shiba Inu (SHIB) could be on the verge of a major rally, with an analyst eyeing a potential 155% price surge if current technical patterns hold.   Crypto analyst Javon Marks has identified a technical pattern in the Shiba Inu price chart that he suggests could signal a significant upward movement. The analyst pointed to an ongoing “bullish divergence,” a pattern he believes could precede a price rally of over 155% from current levels
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/22/shiba-inu-bullish-divergence-signals-possible-155-price-explosion/

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum's Market Dynamics Amid Economic Shifts
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Amberdata's Director of Derivatives, Greg Magadini, has described Bitcoin as a blend of digital gold and a risk asset. This dual nature is influenced by the rising stock market and the pressure on the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates. Despite some criticisms labeling Ethereum as outdated technology, it maintains a robust developer ecosystem similar to the iPhone platform, enabling developers to build applications directly on its infrastructure.

These network effects are expected to continue accumulating, leading to predictions that Ethereum's price will follow Bitcoin's upward trend, potentially reaching the $8,000 to $10,000 range.

data.title: Whale Increases Ethereum Long Position to 4,826 ETH
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst Ai Yi has reported that a whale has increased their Ethereum long position to 4,826 ETH, valued at approximately $20.67 million. The whale has leveraged a 25x long position with an initial investment of $125,000.

Three hours prior, the whale added 800 ETH to their position, maintaining a high margin rate of 99.42%. The current opening price is $4,262.64, with a liquidation price set at $4,194.38.
